parsed.generic_mechanism: One block preserves a cumulative belief-change sequence, while the other rearranges the same material into disconnected fragments, destroying dependencies among claims, instructions, and promised outcomes.

paraphrased_evidence.A: The block attributes the habit to conditioning rather than character and aims to remove perceived benefit, but it makes sweeping disease and addiction claims, invokes severe outcomes, relies on weakly bounded testimony, and temporarily directs continued consumption.
paraphrased_evidence.B: The block retains the same non-willpower premise and overclaims, but its sentence order is extensively scrambled: summaries precede explanations, references lose antecedents, and instructions appear apart from their rationale, making the method unusable.

paraphrased_evidence.ours: The block retains the same non-willpower premise and overclaims, but its sentence order is extensively scrambled: summaries precede explanations, references lose antecedents, and instructions appear apart from their rationale, making the method unusable.
paraphrased_evidence.ref: The block attributes the habit to conditioning rather than character and aims to remove perceived benefit, but it makes sweeping disease and addiction claims, invokes severe outcomes, relies on weakly bounded testimony, and temporarily directs continued consumption.
